somali.function_grapher_keyboard_shortcuts_1_: Sawiraha function-ka. Gaabiyaha kiiboodhka: 1 ilaa 6 waxay doortaan nooca function-ka, D derivative, A bedda, T shaxda, L baro.
somali.where_the_function_crosses_the_x_axis_: Halka function-ku ka gudubto dhidibka x. Barahaan, f(x) = 0. Helitaanka xididada waa lama huraan xisaabta algebra iyo calculus.
somali.where_the_function_crosses_the_y_axis_: Halka function-ku ka gudubto dhidibka y. Kani waa qiimaha f(0) — kaliya gali x = 0.
somali.the_slope_tells_you_how_steep_the_func: Jiheyntu waxay kuu sheegaysaa sida function-ku u dheer yahay barta kasta. Xariiqda taabashadu waxay taabataa qalooca hal bar oo keliya. Isticmaal raadraaca si aad u sahamiso!
somali.the_derivative_measures_the_rate_of_ch: Derivative-ku wuxuu cabbiraa heerka isbeddelka. Shid si aad u aragto sida jiheyntu ugu beddelanto function-ka. Halka f′(x) = 0, function-ku wuxuu leeyahay qiime ugu sarreeya ama ugu hooseeya oo maxalli ah.
somali.the_shaded_area_represents_the_integra: Bedda hadhaysan waxay matashaa integral — «ururinta» guud ee f(x). Nolosha dhabta ah, tan waxay macnayn kartaa masaafada la maray, tamarta la isticmaalay, ama suurtogalnimada.
somali.when_a_0_the_parabola_opens_up_when_a_: Marka a > 0, parabola-du kor bay u furataa (⏣). Marka a < 0, hoos bay u furataa (⏢). Vertex waa barta laalaabashada. Isku day inaad beddesho 'a' si aad u aragto!
somali.amplitude_a_controls_the_height_freque: Amplitude (a) wuxuu xakameeyaa dhererka, frequency (b) wuxuu xakameeyaa inta wareeg, phase shift (c) wuxuu u dhaqaajiyaa mowjadda bidix/midig. Muddada = 2π/b.
somali.v_shaped_absolute_value: Qiime dhab ah oo qaab V ah
somali.using_simple_everyday_words_and_short_: iyadoo la isticmaalayo erayo maalinle fudud iyo jumlado gaagaaban, iyada oo aan lahayn ereyo farsamo
somali.for_a_high_school_algebra_or_pre_calc_: arday dugsi sare oo algebra ama pre-calc ah, oo leh ereyo sida jiheyn, barta gudubka, vertex, muddada, iyo amplitude
somali.click_explain_for_the_ai_tutor_to_desc: Guji «Sharrax» si macallinka AI-gu u sharraxo function-kan heerka akhriska aad dooratay.
somali.function_zoo_six_common_function_shape: Xayawaanka function — lix qaab oo function caadi ah
somali.sliders_for_amplitude_frequency_phase_: Sliders loogu talagalay amplitude, frequency, phase. Kala saarid discrete oo 5 xaaladood ah. Dhibco ma jiraan, muujin ma jirto.
somali.hypothesis_how_does_phase_shift_affect: Mala-awaal: Sidee phase shift u saameeyaa mowjadda la arko?
somali.find_two_settings_that_produce_visuall: Hel laba dejin oo soo saara mowjado isku mid ah muuqaal ahaan.
somali.explain_how_each_parameter_shapes_a_si: Sharrax sida parameter kastaa u qaabeeyo mowjadda sine.
somali.design_note_discrete_5_state_marker_no: Qoraal naqshadeed: calaamad discrete oo 5 xaaladood; dhibco mowjad ma jiraan; muujin ma jirto — naqshad ahaan.
